result.stdout_text:
sed: Stream editor with in-place editing, addresses, and substitutions.
Usage: sed [OPTION]... [SCRIPT] [INPUTFILE...]

Supports a GNU-compatible subset: addresses (line, $, /regex/, range), commands p/d/q/n/s/a/i/c, and options -n, -e, -f, -E, -i[SUFFIX]. Common clustered short options like -ne and -nEf<file> also work.
Examples:
  sed "s/ERROR/WARN/" /logs/app.log
  sed -n "1,5p" /logs/app.log
  sed -i.bak "s/us-east-1/us-west-2/" /config/app.env
